title: Chapter 128
content:
Chapter 128

“Haa… Haa…”

No, contrary to what you are all expecting, they were not panting after a heavy, sexual workout.

No, they were all panting because of the gruesome battles that had occurred over the past two days.

The first floor took us about eight hours to clear, and adding the boss to that, it becomes around nine hours.

The second floor, which was full of the mimic kind, took us about fifty-three hours to clear.

It was so difficult, and so tiring, that even the sexual interactions I had with Martha and Cassandra were just brief enough to have them swallow my cum to restore their auras.

Lucas was stuck on recovery potions, though.

Not all the mimics were difficult to deal with. Some took the shape of the others, not just me, but defeating them became difficult just because of that very reason.

They hesitated.

Lucas hesitated to kill the one who took Cassandra’s shape, and vice versa happened in Cassandra’s case.

Even though they had no problem killing those who took my shape.

Anyway, the number of the mimics was startling as well. Sometimes, there were two or three at once, making the battles increasingly difficult. Since I had to hide my physical prowess thanks to Cassandra's presence, I could only intervene with magic, severely limiting myself.

The good news was that there were enough of them to raise my level quite a few times. Of course, I didn’t get much for the ones who took the shape of others since their difficulty would be very lowered then, hence, lowering their rank also.

But, we killed a well over a hundred mimics over the last two days, and about twenty of them took my shape, and the ones who took Cassandra were also around C-rank, so I gained from there too.

“Can we rest now?” Martha asked, heavily gasping for air after we fought a group of mimics again, but for the final time, since we were just before the gate.

“Sure,” I said. Even I was a little tired now. Using only mana to deal with the mimics and constantly consuming mana recovery positions would have that effect even on me, let alone the rest.

“We will rest for eight hours, two hours each, while three of us will remain awake for any monsters, which I doubt there are any left, but no one knows for sure,” I said, to which everyone nodded and agreed on the spot.

“I’m fine with however you want.” Martha shrugged her shoulders and flopped on the ground.

“Me too.” Cassandra also chose to just agree with me due to how tired she was.

“Then Lucas can go first, and then Martha, then Cassandra, and then me.” I proposed.

“I’ll go last. You decide the order for others.” Lucas denied my suggestion.

“Suit yourself,” I replied and set the order to Martha, Cassandra, me, and then Lucas.

Everyone nodded, and as soon as the order was decided, Martha practically fell on the ground on her back and immediately fell asleep, even though the ground was rock solid.

I chose to do meditation to circulate my mana to relieve my fatigue. Constantly consuming mana potions wasn’t good for your body, so I had to do this to remove impurities from the potions.

I could feel a pair of eyes on me, but I didn’t bother asking the owner what they wanted. For the next two hours, I only circulated my mana to find and expel the impurities in my body, and used [Cleanse] simultaneously so the stench wouldn’t spread.

By the time I opened my eyes, Lucas was trying to wake up Martha, and Cassandra was deep asleep.

“Let her sleep. We don’t need her at the moment anyway.” I told Lucas, who nodded and left, Martha, who was out cold, and, after checking on Cassandra, began to circulate his aura too.

As much as I wanted to grope the sleeping ladies, I chose to let them sleep and focused on guarding the place. I wasn’t that tired and not that sleepy, so it didn’t matter if I kept an eye out.

I did, however, run by my situation one more time. From my coming to this world to the monsters with dicks inside of them. The system was still kind of glitchy about the quest related to this dungeon, but I had a feeling it was connected to that.

The only problem was whether whoever created those artificial monsters was coming here or not. I had another theory, but I didn’t know if it would stand in this case or not.

I guess only time would tell.

“You should rest now too.” Cassandra’s voice fell in my ears.

“Is it my time?” I asked.

“Yes,” Cassandra replied while stretching her arms before turning her attention to Lucas, who was still busy doing aura circulations.

I nodded and went to sleep. I was quite refreshed after the constant mana circulations, but I still fell asleep as soon as I lay down on the ground.

I was awoken by Cassandra once she informed me that Lucas had gone to sleep. Martha was still sleeping, and Cassandra didn’t choose to wake her up.

“Any idea what could be behind that door?” Cassandra asked after a while.

“Only going in could tell,” I replied. I would have been sure if the first-floor boss monster was a golem, but since it was a mimic, then the boss of this floor could be the normal boss of the next floor.

Of course, it could also be a mimic, but as I said, since I couldn’t be sure of it, I wasn’t saying anything.

What I was sure of, however, was that Lucas was asleep.

“Young Lady, can you help me with my penis. It has been some time since our last interaction, and I’m aching.” I said before that Cassandra could remain stuck on the previous topic.

“Sure. But you should practice restraint. What if there isn’t a woman with you next time?” Cassandra said while standing up and making her way to me, while she also advised me on my ‘condition’.

“Haha. I will make sure to do so.” I replied, but lowered my pants after my dick was hard to show her it really was aching.

Aching for her touch.

She sat down between my legs and was about to use her hands when I told her to wait.

“What is it?” She asked, her hands inches away from my dick.

“Could we try something new this time? It’s something I have tried with your mother, and she loved it.” I suggested, and also made sure to throw in the reference of a trusted person, so it would be easier to convince her.

“Sure. What do I have to do?” She asked before sitting up straight on her knees.

“Please take off your clothes first, and then I will tell you.” I requested Sandra.

“Alright. But shouldn’t we wake up Martha? Your actions tend to make me very distracted during this… act. I suppose the same is for you too, so we should have her stay guard.” Cassandra suggested while she peeled off her armor and then her shirt and leather pants.

“You do not have to worry, young lady. I will keep an eye out.” I replied with a convincing smile.

Yeah, right, I would. I would be surprised if I were able to focus on anything but that kiwi-like fragrance of her pussy or that amazing ass of hers.

“…Alright.” Cassandra didn’t sound convinced, but she didn’t stretch the issue and just finished undressing.

Once she was done, I took charge, and it took some time to settle her in position, but once she was done, I couldn’t help but smile to myself.

“Jack… are you sure this is…”

Like I said, she wasn’t convinced very easily.

“Do not worry, young lady. I have done this many times with your mother, and she liked it very much.” I tried to convince her anyway.

“Hmm… But I hope you don’t use my mouth the same way as before. I didn’t like that.” Cassandra made sure to remind me she didn’t like the facefuck we had the other day.

“Whatever you’re comfortable with, young lady. I will make sure not to go too deep.” I replied.

“Alright. That is that, but why is your face there?” Cassandra asked.

“So that I can please you at the same time. I feel very guilty that I haven’t been able to massage you here for the past two days, and only you have been pleasing me.” I replied.

She had only given me handjobs, though, since she didn’t like blowjobs that much, apparently. Not the rough ones anyway.

“Is it like how Martha did?” She asked.

“Yes,” I replied, and call me paranoid, but I swear her pussy twitched when I replied.

Haha.

So she was looking forward to this, huh?

“Now then, I’ll show you how it is done,” I said, and before she could react, I plunged my dick inside of her mouth and my tongue inside her kiwi pussy.

~~

Let me know if there are any mistakes.
